dag.dag_name: Logistics carrier data delay cascades into Returns RMA label generation

tasks.dependencies: Waits on upstream domain A DAG completion
Waits on upstream domain B DAG completion
Waits on upstream domain C DAG completion
Requires all 3 upstream domains to have completed
Consolidates Customers data across upstream domains

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_CUS_CASC' AS dag_id, 'consolidate_cus' AS task_name;

tasks.dependencies: Compares actual start time to expected upstream-completion time
Branch: no material cascade delay detected
Branch: cascade delay detected, triggers cross-DAG AutoRCA
Notifies stakeholders of cascade impact with root-cause chain

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_CUS_CASC' AS dag_id, 'load_target' AS task_name;

incident.incident_name: Logistics carrier data delay cascades into Returns RMA label generation
incident.description: Cascading Delay incident on the Customers pipeline (RTL_CUS_CASC): logistics carrier data delay cascades into Returns RMA label generation.
incident.symptoms: Returns RMA label-generation DAG, which needs carrier rate/service data from the Logistics domain, is delayed 3h.
incident.root_cause: Logistics' carrier rate-shopping DAG hit an unexpectedly long run (see Unexpected LRJ catalogue) due to FedEx API pagination drift, and Returns' label generation has a hard dependency with no cached-rate fallback.
incident.business_impact: Customers awaiting return labels experience a delayed email, increasing return-related customer service contact volume.
incident.resolution: Cache the prior successful carrier-rate snapshot and allow Returns to fall back to it (with a staleness flag) if the live dependency exceeds a grace period.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: Logistics' carrier rate-shopping DAG hit an unexpectedly long run (see Unexpected LRJ catalogue) due to FedEx API pagination drift, and Returns' label generation has a hard dependency with no cached-rate fallback.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, cross-DAG lineage/dependency graph, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow shows Returns DAG's ExternalTaskSensor poke count and duration far above its historical baseline
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog cross-DAG delay chain view shows Logistics anomaly directly preceding Returns delay
expected_rca.resolution: Cache the prior successful carrier-rate snapshot and allow Returns to fall back to it (with a staleness flag) if the live dependency exceeds a grace period.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Add cached-fallback-availability as a standard architecture pattern option in the metadata model for any DAG depending on volatile third-party rate/pricing data.
